summary: On Site Expenditure Feature Testing Complete - All features implemented and working correctly. Backend (12/12 tests passed) and Frontend (all UI tests passed). Estimated costs entry on Buildings & Infrastructure page, Actual costs entry on Construction Progress page, and read-only display on Project Costs page all verified.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/site-expenditure/{project_id} returns 200
Backend: GET site-expenditure has correct fields (site_development_cost, salaries, etc.)
Backend: POST /api/site-expenditure creates/updates estimated costs
Backend: POST site-expenditure calculates total correctly
Backend: GET /api/actual-site-expenditure returns 200
Backend: GET actual-site-expenditure requires quarter and year params (422 validation)
Backend: POST /api/actual-site-expenditure creates quarterly actual costs
Backend: POST actual-site-expenditure calculates total correctly
Backend: Actual expenditure data persists separately per quarter
Backend: Estimated development cost includes site expenditure data
Backend: Returns default values for non-existent project
Backend: Zero values handled correctly
Frontend: Buildings & Infrastructure page has 'On Site Expenditure' tab
Frontend: Estimated expenditure form found with all 6 cost fields
Frontend: Construction Progress page has 'Actual Site Expenditure' tab
Frontend: Actual expenditure form shows quarter-specific costs
Frontend: Save Site Expenditure button works
Frontend: Project Costs page shows 'Auto-populated' badge
Frontend: Project Costs page shows 'Data entered in Construction Progress page' message
Frontend: Project Costs page has read-only inputs for actual site expenditure
Frontend: Data flows correctly from Construction Progress to Project Costs page
seed_data_creation: Test data created for actual-site-expenditure with test values for Q1-Q4 2025 and 2026
context_for_next_testing_agent: On Site Expenditure feature fully tested. Three pages involved: 1) Buildings & Infrastructure page for estimated costs (tab: 'On Site Expenditure'), 2) Construction Progress page for actual costs (tab: 'Actual Site Expenditure'), 3) Project Costs page displays both estimated (editable) and actual (read-only with 'Auto-populated' badge). Backend endpoints: /api/site-expenditure for estimated, /api/actual-site-expenditure for actual per quarter.

estimated_site_expenditure.details: Estimated costs form with 6 fields (Development Cost, Salaries, Consultants Fee, Site Over-heads, Services Cost, Machinery Cost). Shows total and saves correctly.

actual_site_expenditure.details: Actual costs form per quarter with same 6 fields. Requires quarter and year params. Shows quarterly total and saves correctly.

project_costs_readonly.details: Shows 'On Site Expenditure for Development' section in Actual Development Cost column with 'Auto-populated' badge, 'Data entered in Construction Progress page' message, and read-only inputs displaying actual costs.

data_flow.details: Data flows correctly: Buildings page estimated costs → Project Costs estimated column, Construction Progress actual costs → Project Costs actual column (read-only)
